title: Big Tools
description: All required tools in one mod
body:
## Tired of switching default tools? 
Simplify your Minecraft adventures and save time with the advanced multi-tools! This mod enhance the power of an axe, pickaxe, and shovel into custom different tools, letting you:

* **Mine faster**: Clear large areas effortlessly with a 3x3 mining capability for stone, dirt, gravel, sand, and more.

* **Chop trees instantly**: Fell entire trees with a single swing, thanks to advanced tree-detection logic that safely identifies real trees without damaging your crafted structures.

* **Protect containers**: Smart block detection prevents accidental mining of chests, hoppers, dispensers, furnaces, and other containers—keeping your loot safe.

* **Enchant your way**: Fully supports all vanilla enchantments, so you can personalize and empower your tools exactly how you like.

### Upgrade your efficiency, protect your builds, and streamline your inventory—all with **Big Tools [ALL IN ONE]**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zCMTG7AGON4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
